name: dev-team
description: Orchestrates a team of specialized AI agents for full-cycle software development with inline quality gates

interface.shortDescription: Codex-native specialist orchestration with review gates
interface.longDescription: Brings the dev-team coordinator workflow to Codex through bundled skills that dispatch specialist subagents and enforce inline review-and-rework gates.
defaultPrompt: Use dev-team to coordinate a backend and frontend implementation for this task.
Use dev-team reviewer flow to inspect my recent changes for correctness risks.
Use dev-team to choose the right specialist workflow for this codebase task.
